characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Timothy Drake, back in green and reunited with (most) of his closest and most dedicated friends.

characters.name: Robin
characters.description: Timothy Drake, back in green and reunited with (most) of his closest and most dedicated friends.

characters.name: Superboy
characters.description: The missing Superboy, tracked down and reunited with the friends who helped him learn what it means to be a person.

characters.name: Impulse
characters.description: The speedster from the future, with his cheerful impulsive nature restored.

characters.name: Wonder Girl
characters.description: The demi-goddess granddaughter of Zeus (thus making her Wonder Woman's niece), relearning how to have deep and meaningful relationships that aren't built on lies.

characters.name: Secret
characters.description: The ghost of a girl murdered in a ritual. AfterRobin,SuperboyandImpulseare tasked with capturing her by the D.E.O. which had previously been keeping her in captivity the trio realize that she is not what they were told and they lie to both the government and the Justice League to protect her. When the three founded Young Justice shortly thereafter she was one of the first to join alongside Arrowette and Wonder Girl. Cain and Abel: She was murdered by her brother. Came Back Strong: She returned from death as a ghost likePsychopomp. The Ditz: Until the last few issues, the others agree that Secret only becomes ditzy after spending too much time with Impulse. Dreaming of Things to Come: Even before her death.

characters.name: Arrowette
characters.description: A prodigious archer and one of the first team members she is the daughter of the first Arrowette who talked her into taking on the name. She eventually retired from costumed super-heroics after she nearly killed a murderer out of a desire for vengeance. She would go on to try and live a normal life, competing in archery competitions, and even going to the Olympics in the sport. Ambiguously Gay: She's pretty close with Cassie, and when she interacts withSupergirlit's like she's talking to her crush.She's also notably the only female member of the group who doesn't have a romantic dynamic with a male counterpart. Secret has an intense, albeit, unrequited crush on Tim, Kon and Cassie have aWill They or Won't They?, and Anita's relationship with Slobo starts out as anOdd Friendshipbefore delving intoShip Tease. She's also notably the only female member of the group who doesn't have a romantic dynamic with a male counterpart. Secret has an intense, albeit, unrequited crush on Tim, Kon and Cassie have aWill They or Won't They?, and Anita's relationship with Slobo starts out as anOdd Friendshipbefore delving intoShip Tease. Ascended Extra: Suzanne "Cissie" King-Jones, whoTook a Level in Badassafter an appearance in Impulse. Broken Bird: The death of her guidance counselor breaks her pretty badly, and the fact she was willing to murder the guy who did it in cold blood leaves her practically catatonic. From her point of view, her willingness to kill means she's unsuitable to be a superhero compounded by the fact she never wanted to be a hero in the first place.

characters.name: Empress
characters.description: She was inspired to use her natural abilities for heroics after witnessing Arrowette stop a thief and became one of the team members to join after Arrowette's retirement. Anita is the daughter of Donald Fite, a government agent who clashes with the team on occasion. Adapted Out: One of the characters from Young Justice that does not appear in the theanimated seriesusing the name. Affectionate Nickname: Sometimes other characters refer to her as "Nita". Her parents called her "Empress". Ascended Fangirl: Was inspired to become a superheroine by Arrowette. Broken Pedestal: Downplayed. Anita was so inspired by Cissie's heroic actions, she decided to become a hero herself and created the Empress persona. However, due to the latter's intense jealousy, she was subjected to Cissie's nasty attitude and bullying which resulted this trope. After some time, the two do eventually get along.

characters.name: Slobo
characters.description: The smallest ofLobo's clones created from a drop of his blood after Lobo was torn apart on Apokolips. He hid himself away on Young Justice's ship to survive and became their mechanic. Adapted Out: One of the characters from Young Justice that does not appear in the theanimated seriesusing theteam's name. Clone Degeneration: He is dying and eventually loses his eyesight due to this,in the end he makes aHeroic Sacrificeto save Secret from Darkseid before he is killed by it. Do Not Call Me "Paul": He doesn't feel like he deserves to be called Lobo due to his weak body composition compared to the original. It's why he quickly latched onto Slobo for a replacement name. Evil Twin: Inverted with Slobo, the degenerated clone of Lobo who contained all of the Last Czarnian's "repressed" traits: He was intelligent, good-natured, responsible, monogamous, self-sacrificing... oh, and slowly dying from not receiving any of Lobo's superpowers.

characters.name: The Ray
characters.description: A legacy character whosepowers, if mastered, have the potential to make him one of the mostpowerful heroesin the DCU.

characters.name: Wonder Twins
characters.description: Extraterrestrial twins originating from the planet Exxor who were rescued from slavery by the Justice League. They eventually joined Young Justice. Adapted Out: Two of the characters from Young Justice that do not appear in theanimated seriesusing the name. Canon Immigrant: FromSuper Friends. Extreme Omnivore: They eat Cassie'sFloodCD. Brother–Sister Team: They provide the page image.

characters.name: Batgirl
characters.description: A member of the temporary "New Young Justice" team who was warned against interacting with meta-humans by Batman who disapproved yet became a reserve member of Young Justice proper. Cass and Robin areLike Brother and Sister(later actually becoming such when they are both adopted by Bruce) and she isbest friendswith his girlfriend Spoiler, she works frequently with both of them outside of Young Justice. She and Superboy went on a date while she was taking a short vacation to relive some of the stress caused by her job but they decided tobe friendsinstead of being further romantically involved.

characters.name: Lagoon Boy
characters.description: An amphibious humanoid who was allowed into Atlantis by Aquaman as part of his attempt to make Atlantis more open to outsiders. Became a member of the temporary "New Young Justice" team and teamed up with the normal Young Justice as a reserve member after. Following the disbanding of Young Justice he was recruited into Titans East.

characters.name: Teen Lantern
characters.description: A young girl who hacked aGreen LanternBattery to become a superhero. She ran into former members of Young Justice and got sucked into Gemworld with them all in her first outing.

characters.name: Jinny Hex
characters.description: Affirmative-Action Legacy: Jinny is the lesbian, female descendant ofJonah Hex. Foil: To Tim Drake. Both of them arelegacy charactersand the residentbadass normalsof the team. However, Tim Drake has years of experience not only on the team, but also as a Bat-Family member; by contrast, Jinny's only now living up to her ancestor's example and is clearly not ready for the craziness surrounding the greater DC Universe. Gay Cowboy: Gay cowgirl, though it's more of a conceptual relation to the trope as Jinny is from the modern era, so the isolation and social rejection connected to the usual idea of gay old timey cowboys does not rule her life.

characters.name: Naomi
characters.description: A dimensional refugeewho was born with near godlike powers, but had to be shunted to Prime-Earth as an infant because her mother's foe intended to murder her.

characters.name: Aqualad
characters.description: Jackson is Aqualad, raised as a human with his mother keeping his father's identity a secret his Atlantean abilities and being gay made him feel out of place and imprisoned in his own home as he grew older. He was a member of the Rebirth Teen Titans team, but after a bit of talking Impulse was able to recruit him to Young Justice.

characters.name: Sideways
characters.description: A Gotham teen who gained the ability to open teleport portals after a catastrophe. When Impulse showed up to ask for help he jumped at the chance to team up, and was even more excited to learn he was being offered a more permanent position with the team.

characters.name: Dial H
characters.description: Miguel Montez is the current holder of the mystical H dial. Summer Pickens his a friend who helps him survive being chased by everyone after the H Dial, and uses it herself when the situation calls for it.

characters.name: "New Young Justice"
characters.description: Led this temporary team while the regular members recuperated. Part of the oldest super-family in comicsnote(Captain Marvelwas anExpyofSupermanbut Mary Marvel was the firstDistaff Counterpartand debuted beforeSupergirlwho was actuallybased onMary)Freddie became a member of this temporary team who remained an ally/backup on whom the regular members could call for aid. His powers come from subletting powers from Solomon,Hercules, Atlas, Zeus, Achilles, & Mercury. A member of this temporary team and close friend to Beast Boy.

characters.name: The Weinburgs/Relative Heroes
characters.description: A group of adoptive sibling orphans on the run from Social Services and the D.E.O. who are helped by Impulse. All of them help in battle against the villain army of Agua Sin Gaaz in Zandia.

characters.name: Other Allies
characters.description: Courtney was inadvertently given powers after being sacrificed to a spinal-fluid-sucking space parasite by a cult activated her latent meta-gene. Wonder Girl calls on Courtney to help out on larger missions like the invasion of Zandia. Bad Powers, Good People: She works as a hero and from a desire to save people even though her abilities include, to her horror, theTouch of Death. The Big Easy: She is from New Orleans. C-List Fodder:Killed Off for Realby Prometheus. Expy: OfRogue, another runaway Southern girl who is aPower Parasite.

characters.name: Agua Sin Gaaz
characters.description: A Jamaican crime lord and voudoun practitioner responsible for the death of Empress's mother. He resides in the island nation of Zandia, which is entirely populated by super villains. Arch-Enemy: Empress's personal villain. Artificial Zombie: Combining his science with traditional vodou magic, he was able to create new bodies for deceased souls to inhabit, which he called Antibodies. Cloning Body Parts: He used his developments to grow back Kite-Man's severed arm. Death by Irony: He uses the metaphor of "devouring" people rather frequently,and ends up being eaten whole by Secret.

characters.name: Agenda's Point Men
characters.description: A team of super-powered clones made byAgenda. Adaptive Ability: Blank Slate's powers allow him to match whomever he face. The Blank: Blank Slate. Clone Angst: After learning they are clones and being told they are not real people because of it. Dishing Out Dirt: Groundswell has earth manipulation powers.

characters.name: A.P.E.S.
characters.description: The All-Purpose Enforcement Squad (A.P.E.S.) was a secretive branch of the United States Government with ties to every federal organization from the FBI to the CIA, and even the D.E.O.. Two of their top agents were Donald Fite and Ishido Maad, together forming the duo "Fite 'n Maad". Fun with Acronyms:All-PurposeEnforcementSquad Government Agency of Fiction: Lacks a real-life counterpart. Landmarking the Hidden Base: Their clandestine headquarters is located inside Mount Rushmore. Reincarnation: Donald Fite and his wife are reincarnated as babies after their deaths.

characters.name: The D.E.O.
characters.description: The U.S. Department of Extranormal Operations is not necessarily an evil organization, but their facilities designed to house and study metahumans tend to be used to imprison to innocent metahumans like Secret. After Robin, Impulse, and Superboy help her escape following the D.E.O. misrepresenting what she was and asking them to help return their "monstrous" specimen to them Secret led Young Justice in freeing others held captive at the facility.

characters.name: Harm
characters.description: A boy whose life goal is to bethe world's best murderer. Cain and Abel: He murdered his sister. Came Back Strong: His death ends up making him even more powerful, giving himNecromancerabilities. Cool Sword: A magic one. Deal with the Devil: The source of Harm's powers which involved the sacrifice of his younger sisterresulting in the creation of Secret.
